q: If \( z = 3 - 2i \), then find the conjugate \( \bar{z} \).
Find the additive inverse of the complex number \( z = -5 + 4i \).
If \( z = 1 + i \), find the value of \( z^2 \).
Find the real part of the complex number \( z = (2 + i)(3 - i) \).
Find the multiplicative inverse of \( i \).
Express the complex number \( z = i(2 - i) \) in the form \( a + bi \).
